    of(T) - Static method in interface io.github.igorgf.control.Option
    Factory method for creating a new Present<T> instance.
    ofNullable(T) - Static method in interface io.github.igorgf.control.Option
    Factory method for creating a new Present<T> instance.
    Option<T> - Interface in io.github.igorgf.control
    A sum type representing the presence or absence of a value, as a null-safe alternative to Optional.
    or(CheckedSupplier) - Method in interface io.github.igorgf.control.Option
    If this is a Present, returns this describing the value, otherwise uses the supplier to return a new Option<T>.
